title: Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Refill – Twinpack. Pheromone Technology. Poison-Free. Monitor Infestations. 2 Life-time Indicators and 2 Pheromone Glue Boards

The monitoring glue traps are designed by experts and tested by pest control professionals combing pheromone technology with a large catching surface to provide maximum monitoring
Contains two lifetime indicators and two pheromone glue pads
Provides up to 24 weeks monitoring for clothes moths in home storage areas
Chemical and poison-free clothes moth monitoring, ideal for use in wardrobes, cupboards where woollens, furs and natural fibres are stored

description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Refills Monitor clothes moths Protect clothes in storage by monitoring with a proven pheromone technology from Zero In. The Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap is designed by experts and tested by professionals, with millions sold worldwide. The traps are a discreet and effective way to monitor clothes moth infestations and protect delicate woollens and fabrics. Poison-free and easy to use, clothes moths are attracted into the trap from which they cannot escape so you know they are there and can treat the infestation. Monitors clothes moth infestations. Suitable for drawers, cupboards and wardrobes. Integrated hanger - hang or stand. Poison-free pheromone monitoring. Re-usable - refill with Zero In Demi-Diamond Clothes Moth Trap Refills Product Highlights Poison-Free Monitoring Safe for use around children and pets, these easy-to-use traps contain a natural clothes moth pheromone to monitor clothes moths. Infestation warning The natural pheromone lures male moths into the trap where they will be immediately caught on the adhesive strip, so that you can see if you have an infestation to treat. Protects Clothes in Storage Suitable for use in wardrobes, cupboards, and drawers to monitor for clothes moths so you can treat the problem with a moth control product. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of moth control solutions including pheromone traps, balls, aerosols, natural repellents and more - everything you need for complete protection against clothes moths. Understanding Clothes Moths Signs of Clothes Moths Unfortunately the first sure sign of a clothes moth infestation will be damage to natural clothing and fabrics. Particularly if the items affected have been kept in storage. Look out for: Visible damage to clothing (holes) Seeing larvae and/or adult moths Webbing/cocoons in corners of wardrobes or drawers Causes of Clothes Moth Clothes moths are attracted to animal hair (wool, cashmere, fur) which provides a rich source of food for their larvae. Dirty/used clothes are usually to blame for initial infestations as moths are drawn to sweat and body oil. Be extra careful when introducing vintage clothing to wardrobes and drawers and ideally wash/dry clean before storing. Treatment & Prevention Larvae cause the damage so it's important to break the cycle. Wash clothing before storage and place Zero In moth repellent products within wardrobes and drawers. Apply Zero In solutions and sprays to the inside of wardrobes and furniture prior to storing fabrics inside and monitor for infestations with pheromone traps.
